messages.content: Respond with JSON only, no commentary. Strict schema: {"event": string, "registration_url": string, "deadline": "YYYY-MM-DD", "steps": [string, string, string]}. Fill it for the State Election Technology Conference 2026 in Denver, CO. Use a plausible https URL on 'stateelectiontech.example.org'. Do not add any extra keys, text, or reminders.
